name: Switch
description: PROPOSED contract extracted from examples/astryx/.astryx-sandbox/node_modules/@astryxdesign/core/src/Switch/Switch.tsx (react-tsx adapter) — API surface only; anatomy, tokens, and design bindings await reconciliation and human review.

props.name: label
props.description: Label text for the switch (always rendered for accessibility).

props.name: isLabelHidden
props.description: Whether to visually hide the label (still accessible to screen readers).

props.name: description
props.description: Description text displayed below the label.

props.name: isLoading
props.description: Whether the switch is in a loading state.

props.name: value
props.description: Whether the switch is on or off.

props.name: htmlName
props.description:
The HTML name attribute for the underlying checkbox input.
Useful for form submissions.

props.name: disabledMessage
props.description:
Explains why the switch is disabled. When set together with `isDisabled`,
the switch shows a tooltip with this text on hover and keyboard focus, and
the control stays focusable (via `aria-disabled`) so the reason is
discoverable by keyboard and assistive technology. Activation stays
blocked.

Use this instead of wrapping a disabled switch in `Tooltip` — disabled
controls don't emit the pointer events an external tooltip needs.

props.name: isOptional
props.description: Whether the field is optional. Mutually exclusive with isRequired.

props.name: isRequired
props.description: Whether the switch is required. Mutually exclusive with isOptional.

props.name: labelTooltip
props.description: Tooltip text to display in an info icon at the end of the label.

props.name: labelPosition
props.description:
Which side of the switch the label appears on.
- 'start': Label appears before the switch
- 'end': Label appears after the switch

props.name: labelSpacing
props.description:
Spacing behavior between label and switch.
- 'hug': Label and switch are positioned next to each other
- 'spread': Label and switch are pushed to opposite ends

'default' is a deprecated alias for 'hug'.

events.name: change
events.description: Callback fired when the switch state changes.

events.name: focus
events.description: Callback fired when the switch receives focus.

events.name: blur
events.description: Callback fired when the switch loses focus.
